case_title: THOMAS MCGRATH ET AL VS. GENEVIVE L. FONG ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-16-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-16-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS THOMAS MCGRATH & TIMOTHY HEROD, AND DEFENDANT GENEVIVE L. FONG. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT RICHARD Y. FONG, BUT MS. FONG HAS POWER OF ATTORNEY FOR MR. FONG. GISELLE FONG, A WITNESS FOR DEFENDANTS, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. NO PROOF OF SERVICE, BUT DEFENDANT GENEVIVE L. FONG WAIVED SERVICE OF PLAINTIFFS' CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING FOR BOTH HERSELF AND RICHARD Y. FONG. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-16-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,729.55 FILED BY MCGRATH, THOMAS HEROD, TIMOTHY AS TO DEFENDANT FONG, GENEVIVE L. FONG, RICHARD Y ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCGRATH, THOMAS HEROD, TIMOTHY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FONG, GENEVIVE L. FONG, RICHARD Y $1,792.05 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,867.05 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FONG, RICHARD Y
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FONG, GENEVIVE L. FONG, RICHARD Y
